croa_fraud.reason: CROA violation — no one can guarantee removal

Creating a new credit identity is federal fraud
Buying authorized user status is misrepresentation
No dispute process has 100% success rate
CROA prohibits advance payment for credit repair

Pleading weakens dispute — state facts only
